calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Oct-20-2004 Continued To Oct-25-04 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Oct-25-2004 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This Cause came as reassignment from the Presiding Judge Department for Court Trial/Prove-Up.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Noreen Ikeuye.
Arnold Evje, Esq. for Plaintiff: Davis-Mason a California Limited.
No appearances by the Defendant: Julianna Bogart.
9:38 a.m.- Plaintiff's witness: Tai Chi, was sworn and direct examined.
Exhibit 1- Three day notice dtd. 9-1-04----------ID/EVID.
The Court having heard the testimony and considered the evidence, grants judgment as follows:
Judgment in favor of plaintiff and against defendants for restitution and possession of the premises located at 1338 Stevenson #C, San Francisco.
Lease declared forfeited.
Back rent and per diem damages $2,026.85
Costs per cost bill, for a total of $2,026.85
Judgment signed in open court.
Counsel stipulated for return of exhibit.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Oct-25-2004 Assigned To Trial Court
